How It's Made

Infused, never faked

Each spear is real pineapple, slow-infused in bold natural bases — matcha, spirulina, ube, beet, ginger-orange — so color and flavor run all the way through.

No syrups pretending to be fruit. No mystery powders.

Load It Up

Then we pile it on

Honey, toasted coconut threads, Tajín, chamoy, cinnamon, ube dust — finished right in front of you at the stand.

Your spear, your rules.

Straight From the Stand

The real deal

InfusedPick your base
DrizzledHoney & more
ToppedCoconut & Tajín

Find Us

Catch the stand

We pop up around San Diego, so the spot shifts with the week.

Saturdays — Little Italy Mercato, 8am–1pm
Sundays — Hillcrest Farmers Market, 9am–2pm
Pop-ups — Festivals & private events, by request

Follow @pinapopco for day-of drops.
